name: Cresco Ltd.
summary: Cresco Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, provides various services in the fields of application development, IT infrastructure system architecture, and embedded systems in Japan. The company offers software and systems design, development, and consulting services; ERP consulting services; hardware design and development/prototyping services; data processing services; and design and development support services through system consulting related to control and embedding technologies, as well as cloud and Web design services. It is also involved in the development of add-on applications, and mainframe and open systems; consulting, design, deployment, and development of computer systems; and construction of server infrastructure. The company was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
